sections.markdown:
- 7 km easy recovery run.
- Target pace: about `6:15-6:50 /km`, with permission to go slower.
- HR guardrail: keep this mostly Z1/low Z2, ideally under about `150-152 bpm`; if HR will not settle, shorten rather than forcing distance.
- No strides and no progression. The purpose is to absorb Tuesday/Thursday quality, not prove fitness.
- If Thursday's marathon-pace block was costly, run `5-6 km` instead and keep the same recovery effort.
